landing.eyebrow: Open source · No paywalls · Built by conlangers
landing.headline: Invent a language.
landing.subhead: The all-in-one studio for constructed languages — phonology, lexicon, grammar, custom scripts and paradigm tables. Try the real editor right here, no signup.
landing.editorNote: ↑ This is the actual editor. Add words, reorder your alphabet, switch tools — it's live.
landing.toolkitSubtitle: From phonology to syntax — structured, connected tools that adapt to whatever your language wants to become.
landing.useCasesSubtitle: From sprawling fantasy worlds to serious linguistic study.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps from a blank page to a documented, shareable conlang.
landing.mapSubtitle: Every node is a language. Every connection is a family tree. Discover the constellation of constructed languages being built right now.
landing.wotdDescription: Every word here was invented and defined by a member of the community — complete with IPA, part of speech, and its own writing system. A small window into the worlds being built on LingoCon.
landing.featuredSubtitle: Explore languages created by our community
landing.contributorSubtitle: Help us build the future of conlanging. Join our open source community.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about building languages with LingoCon.
landing.supportMessage: LingoCon is free and community-funded. Help keep the servers running for every conlanger on earth.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Join {count} conlangers building structured, living languages. Free forever — no credit card, no catch.

footer.tagline: The professional toolkit for language construction. Free, open-source, and built by conlangers, for conlangers.
footer.madeWith: Made with intellectual curiosity and ❤ for the art of language creation

dashboard.emptyPrompt: Ready to start building your first constructed language?
dashboard.languageCount: You have {count} {count, plural, =1 {language} other {languages}} in your workspace.
dashboard.startFirstDesc: Create a structured home for your conlang with dictionary, grammar wiki, and more.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.publicProfileDesc: This information will be displayed publicly on your profile page.
settings.avatarUrlHint: Link to an image for your profile picture.
settings.themeDesc: Choose how LingoCon looks. Light, dark, or follow your system.
settings.colorPaletteDesc: Switch between the new Aurora look and the original Classic theme. Applies instantly across the app.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete your account, all your languages, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the LingoCon interface.

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your languages
auth.termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

i18n.addConlangDesc: Translate LingoCon into your constructed language
